hooks.command: test -f config/profile.yml && echo 'Profile: config/profile.yml' || echo 'No profile.yml found. For personalized job scoring, run: make setup'

changed=$(cd /Users/murph/sites/myscout && git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -v 'docs/logs.md' | head -5); if [ -n "$changed" ]; then echo "LOG_REMINDER: Append a one-line entry to docs/logs.md summarizing what changed. Group under today's date (## YYYY-MM-DD). Do not log docs/logs.md edits themselves."; fi
